# Lessons Learned

This file is **persistent** — never delete it. It accumulates lessons from every correction
made across all sessions. The agent reads this at the start of complex tasks to avoid
repeating past mistakes.

---

## How This Works

When the developer corrects the agent, the agent appends a new entry here following the
format below. Over time this becomes a project-specific memory of what goes wrong and how
to prevent it.

---

## Format

```
## [YYYY-MM-DD] — [Brief title of the mistake]

- **What happened:** [What the agent did wrong]
- **Root cause:** [Why it happened]
- **Rule:** [The general principle to prevent recurrence]
- **Applied:** [How this changes future behavior on this project]
```

---

<!-- Lessons are appended below this line -->
